reasoning: The document contains 5 major defects (1 LLM fidelity, 4 programmatic) and 1 minor defect. The major defects include lost digital signature metadata, retained header/footer and page number artifacts, list conversion errors with roman numerals, and incomplete image alt text. Since the major defect count is exactly 5, this document falls into the HUMAN_REVIEW category per the routing thresholds.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: The digital signature metadata text block on page 1 is entirely omitted from the extracted output. While the main name is captured, the digital validation details are lost.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner
DN: cn=Elizabeth S Werner, o=DWM-Solid Waste, ou=NCDENR, email=elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov, c=US
Date: 2016.04.28 09:56:21 -04'00'
concerns.output_quote: [Text completely omitted from the JSON output]

concerns.description: Page number artifacts retained: Page 2 of 5

Header/footer elements retained in output (5): State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Mana; Meeting Officer's Report
Coal Ash Impoundment Classification; Meeting Officer’s Report
Coal Ash Impoundment Classification
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=5, pages_affected=5/5. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

concerns.description: Lists converted incorrectly: 2 ordered list(s) rendered as alphabetical (A, B, C) but contain roman numeral markers (I, II, III) — e.g. "II. March 16, 2016 Public Meeting and Oral Comments Summary"; "II. Public Meeting Sign-in Forms"
concerns.analysis: roman_letter_confusion=2. The renderer misclassified roman numeral lists as alphabetical starting at letter 'I'. Item text retains original roman numerals alongside incorrect letter markers, breaking list semantics.

concerns.description: Incomplete image alt text: 2 image(s) with inadequate descriptions (1 truncated mid-sentence, 1 generic placeholder(s)) — e.g. p1: "...ing from green to dark blue with a white pine tree"; p1: "Unidentified image"
concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=2 (truncated=1, placeholder=1, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.

The list items on Pages 3 and 4 (e.g., 'Excavation', 'Groundwater Assessments', 'Well Testing') are both bolded and explicitly underlined in the source PDF to indicate structural emphasis. While bolding might be preserved or omitted according to HTML mapping, the clear underline element is entirely lost in the output, violating the specific underline preservation rule.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Excavation [Underlined] – Speakers requested that full excavation occur as quickly as possible.
concerns.output_quote: "text": "Excavation – Speakers requested that full excavation occur as quickly as possible."

action_items: Restore the missing digital signature metadata text.
Remove retained page numbers and header/footer elements from the content.
Fix the ordered lists to correctly use roman numeral semantics instead of alphabetical.
Provide complete and descriptive alt text for the images.
Restore the missing underline visual emphasis on structural list items.
